### 2. **Package Dependencies**

**Production:**
- `next@16.1.6` ÔÇö App Router, TypeScript support
- `react@19.2.3` / `react-dom@19.2.3` ÔÇö Core UI
- `tailwindcss@4` (via `@tailwindcss/postcss`) ÔÇö CSS-first utility framework
- **`vexflow@5.0.0`** ÔÇö Score rendering (symbolic only)
- **`tone@15.1.22`** ÔÇö Playback scheduling (no raw audio synthesis)
- **`zustand@5.0.11`** ÔÇö Lightweight state management
- `next-themes@0.4.6` ÔÇö Theme switching (light/dark)
- `framer-motion@12.34.3` ÔÇö Animation library
- `lucide-react@0.575.0` ÔÇö Icon library (sharp, linear)
- `@phosphor-icons/react@2.1.10` ÔÇö Alternative icon set
- `clsx@2.1.1` + `tailwind-merge@3.5.0` ÔÇö Utility class merging

**DevDependencies:**
- `typescript@5` ÔÇö Strict mode required
- `eslint@9` + `eslint-config-next`

### 3. **Design Tokens (src/app/globals.css)**

#### **@theme Block (Tailwind v4 CSS-first)**

| Token | CSS Variable | Purpose |
|-------|---|---|
| `--color-hf-bg` | `var(--hf-bg)` | Primary app background (theme-aware) |
| `--color-hf-surface` | `var(--hf-surface)` | Component surfaces (cards, panels) |
| `--color-hf-detail` | `var(--hf-detail)` | Borders, secondary text, staff lines |
| `--color-hf-accent` | `var(--hf-accent)` | Focus states, active selection (#FFB300) |
| `--color-hf-text` | `var(--hf-text-primary)` | Primary text |
| `--color-hf-text-sub` | `var(--hf-text-secondary)` | Secondary text |
| `--color-hf-violation` | `#d32f2f` | Semantic: Theory violations (Red) |
| `--color-hf-warning` | `#1976d2` | Semantic: Stylistic warnings (Blue) |
| `--color-hf-override` | `#7b1fa2` | Semantic: User overrides (Purple) |

#### **Typography Tokens**

| Token | Font | Purpose |
|-------|------|---------|
| `--font-brand` | Instrument Serif | Hero titles, brand text |
| `--font-body` | Inter | Body text, labels |
| `--font-system` | Satoshi / SF Pro | System data, metadata |

#### **Spacing (8-pt grid)**

```css
--spacing-minor:  2px;    /* Gaps between monospace data */
--spacing-tight:  4px;    /* Small interactive toggles */
--spacing-base:   8px;    /* List item margins */
--spacing-global: 16px;   /* Standard padding (cards, modals) */
--spacing-macro:  32px;   /* Spatial separation (Sandbox/Sidebar) */
```

#### **Border Radius**

```css
--radius-sharp:    0px;   /* VexFlow canvas, logic lines */
--radius-micro:    2px;   /* Tooltips, metadata pills */
--radius-standard: 4px;   /* Buttons, toggles (human touch) */
/* Circular (50%) reserved for draggable noteheads */
```

#### **Shadows (Volumetric Scale)**

```css
--shadow-sm:    0 1px 2px 0 rgba(detail-rgb, 0.08);
--shadow-md:    0 4px 6px -1px rgba(detail-rgb, 0.12), 0 2px 4px -1px rgba(detail-rgb, 0.07);
--shadow-lg:    0 10px 15px -3px rgba(detail-rgb, 0.12), 0 4px 6px -2px rgba(detail-rgb, 0.06);
--shadow-xl:    0 20px 25px -5px rgba(detail-rgb, 0.12), 0 10px 10px -5px rgba(detail-rgb, 0.05);
--shadow-inner: inset 0 2px 4px 0 rgba(detail-rgb, 0.08);
```

#### **Z-Index Scale**

```css
--z-tooltip:  10;
--z-modal:    20;
--z-drawer:   30;
--z-critical: 50;
```

### 6. **Component Patterns & Code Style**

#### **Typing Pattern (All Components)**

```typescript
// Props interface extends React HTML element props
export interface ComponentProps extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement> {
  // Custom props
  customProp?: string;
}

// forwardRef for DOM access
export const Component = React.forwardRef<HTMLElement, ComponentProps>(
  ({ customProp, className, ...props }, ref) => {
    return (
      <div ref={ref} className={cn("base-styles", className)} {...props}>
        Content
      </div>
    );
  }
);

Component.displayName = "Component";
```

#### **Design Token Usage**

```typescript
// Direct CSS variables via style prop
style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}
style={{ backgroundColor: "var(--hf-surface)" }}

// Color mixing (CSS Color Module Level 4)
style={{ backgroundColor: "color-mix(in srgb, var(--hf-surface) 10%, transparent)" }}

// Tailwind utilities with token colors
className="border-[var(--hf-detail)]"
className="text-[var(--hf-text-primary)]"
```

#### **Accessibility (POUR)**

- `aria-label` on interactive elements
- `aria-hidden="true"` on decorative SVG
- Focus rings via globals.css: `outline: 2px solid var(--hf-accent)`
- Role attributes: `role="list"`, `role="listitem"`, `role="img"`
- Skip link in layout.tsx

#### **Theme Switching**

```typescript
// Uses next-themes
const { theme, setTheme } = useTheme();

// Output: dark attribute on <html> activates .dark CSS
// CSS vars respond dynamically via CSS :root and .dark selectors
```

---

### 7. **Music & Score Logic**

#### **Symbolic Note System (noteFactory.ts)**

```typescript
// Types
type Duration = "w" | "h" | "q" | "8" | "16";  // VexFlow compatible

interface SymbolicNote {
  key: string;              // e.g. "c/4" (VexFlow format)
  duration: Duration;       // Quarter note = "q"
  midi: number;             // For Tone.js scheduling
}

interface Measure {
  notes: SymbolicNote[];
  timeSignature: string;    // e.g. "4/4"
}

// Factory functions
- generateMeasures(count, beatsPerMeasure, scale, seed?)
  Ôćĺ Measure[]
- toVexFlowArgs(note: SymbolicNote)
  Ôćĺ { keys: string[], duration: string }
```

**Key Constraint:** Symbolic only ÔÇö MIDI values are for Tone.js scheduling, not audio synthesis. No AudioContext manipulation in frontend.

### 9. **Design System File References**

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| **design-system.md** | Full spec: colors, typography, spacing, motion rules, POUR guidelines, Music Theory axioms, JSON token schema |
| **src/app/globals.css** | Tailwind v4 CSS-first implementation of design-system.md tokens |
| **PLAN.md** | 4-phase redesign roadmap |
| **HarmonyForge.pen** | Design file (Pencil app) ÔÇö source of truth for component visuals & Pencil Node IDs |

---

### 10. **Key Architectural Boundaries**

| Concern | Location | What's Forbidden |
|---------|----------|------------------|
| **Score rendering** | Frontend (VexFlow) | No direct DOM manipulation outside useEffect |
| **Playback** | Frontend (Tone.js) | No raw AudioContext access; symbolic scheduling only |
| **Constraint logic** | Backend only | Never implement voice-leading rules in frontend |
| **Theory violations** | Backend API Ôćĺ displayed in frontend | Red Line tooltips rendered via React, data sourced from API |
| **State** | Zustand | No local useState for core musical data |

---

### 11. **Utility Functions**

**`src/lib/utils.ts`:**

```typescript
// Custom Tailwind merge with shadow/radius extensions
function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {
  return customTwMerge(clsx(inputs));
}

// Supports: shadow-sm/md/lg/xl/inner, rounded-sharp/micro/standard
```

     9Ôćĺ
    10Ôćĺ@theme {
    11Ôćĺ  /* Color tokens ÔÇö resolved from runtime CSS vars for theme switching */
    12Ôćĺ  --color-hf-bg:        var(--hf-bg);
    13Ôćĺ  --color-hf-surface:   var(--hf-surface);
    14Ôćĺ  --color-hf-detail:    var(--hf-detail);
    15Ôćĺ  --color-hf-accent:    var(--hf-accent);
    16Ôćĺ  --color-hf-text:      var(--hf-text-primary);
    17Ôćĺ  --color-hf-text-sub:  var(--hf-text-secondary);
    18Ôćĺ
    19Ôćĺ  /* Semantic ÔÇö fixed, cross-theme (MASTER.md ┬ž1) */
    20Ôćĺ  --color-hf-violation: #d32f2f;
    21Ôćĺ  --color-hf-warning:   #1976d2;
    22Ôćĺ  --color-hf-override:  #7b1fa2;
    23Ôćĺ
    24Ôćĺ  /* Typography ÔÇö MASTER.md ┬ž2 */
    25Ôćĺ  --font-brand:  'Instrument Serif', serif;
    26Ôćĺ  --font-body:   'Inter', sans-serif;
    27Ôćĺ  --font-system: 'Satoshi', 'SF Pro', ui-monospace, monospace;
    28Ôćĺ
    29Ôćĺ  /* Spacing ÔÇö 8-pt grid, MASTER.md ┬ž3 */
    30Ôćĺ  --spacing-minor:  2px;
    31Ôćĺ  --spacing-tight:  4px;
    32Ôćĺ  --spacing-base:   8px;
    33Ôćĺ  --spacing-global: 16px;
    34Ôćĺ  --spacing-macro:  32px;
    35Ôćĺ
    36Ôćĺ  /* Border radius ÔÇö MASTER.md ┬ž3 */
    37Ôćĺ  --radius-sharp:    0px;
    38Ôćĺ  --radius-micro:    2px;
    39Ôćĺ  --radius-standard: 4px;
    40Ôćĺ
    41Ôćĺ  /* Shadows ÔÇö MASTER.md ┬ž3 volumetric scale */
    42Ôćĺ  --shadow-sm:    0 1px 2px 0 rgba(var(--hf-detail-rgb), 0.08);
    43Ôćĺ  --shadow-md:    0 4px 6px -1px rgba(var(--hf-detail-rgb), 0.12), 0 2px 4px -1px rgba(var(--hf-detail-rgb), 0.07);
    44Ôćĺ  --shadow-lg:    0 10px 15px -3px rgba(var(--hf-detail-rgb), 0.12), 0 4px 6px -2px rgba(var(--hf-detail-rgb), 0.06);
    45Ôćĺ  --shadow-xl:    0 20px 25px -5px rgba(var(--hf-detail-rgb), 0.12), 0 10px 10px -5px rgba(var(--hf-detail-rgb), 0.05);
    46Ôćĺ  --shadow-inner: inset 0 2px 4px 0 rgba(var(--hf-detail-rgb), 0.08);
    47Ôćĺ
    48Ôćĺ  /* z-index scale ÔÇö MASTER.md ┬ž4 */
    49Ôćĺ  --z-tooltip:  10;
    50Ôćĺ  --z-modal:    20;
    51Ôćĺ  --z-drawer:   30;
    52Ôćĺ  --z-critical: 50;
    53Ôćĺ}
    54Ôćĺ
    55Ôćĺ/* ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    56Ôćĺ   Sonata ÔÇö Light Mode (default)
    57Ôćĺ   MASTER.md ┬ž1: Antique White bg, Cherry Wood surface
    58Ôćĺ   ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ */
    59Ôćĺ:root {

    83Ôćĺ}

    85Ôćĺ/* ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    86Ôćĺ   Nocturne ÔÇö Dark Mode

    88Ôćĺ   ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ */
    89Ôćĺ.dark {

   114Ôćĺ
   115Ôćĺ/* ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
   116Ôćĺ   Font utility classes ÔÇö match .pen fontFamily values exactly

   118Ôćĺ   ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ */
   119Ôćĺ.font-brand   { font-family: var(--font-fraunces), 'Fraunces', serif; }

   126Ôćĺ   Base resets & global rules
   127Ôćĺ   ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ */
   128Ôćĺ*, *::before, *::after {
   129Ôćĺ  box-sizing: border-box;
   130Ôćĺ}
   131Ôćĺ
   132Ôćĺhtml, body {
   133Ôćĺ  height: 100%;
   134Ôćĺ  overflow: hidden;
   135Ôćĺ  background-color: var(--hf-bg);
   136Ôćĺ  color: var(--hf-text-primary);
   137Ôćĺ  font-family: var(--font-body);
   138Ôćĺ  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
   139Ôćĺ  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
   140Ôćĺ}
   141Ôćĺ
   142Ôćĺ/* Focus rings ÔÇö POUR, MASTER.md ┬ž7 */
   143Ôćĺ:focus-visible {
   144Ôćĺ  outline: 2px solid var(--hf-accent);
   145Ôćĺ  outline-offset: 2px;
   146Ôćĺ}
   147Ôćĺ
   148Ôćĺ/* Skip-to-content ÔÇö POUR, MASTER.md ┬ž7 */
   149Ôćĺ.skip-link {
   150Ôćĺ  position: absolute;
   151Ôćĺ  top: -9999px;
   152Ôćĺ  left: 50%;
   153Ôćĺ  transform: translateX(-50%);
   154Ôćĺ  background: var(--hf-accent);
   155Ôćĺ  color: #1a1a1a;
   156Ôćĺ  padding: 8px 16px;
   157Ôćĺ  border-radius: var(--radius-standard);
   158Ôćĺ  font-family: var(--font-body);
   159Ôćĺ  font-size: 0.833rem;
   160Ôćĺ  font-weight: 500;
   161Ôćĺ  z-index: var(--z-critical);
   162Ôćĺ  text-decoration: none;
   163Ôćĺ}
   164Ôćĺ.skip-link:focus {
   165Ôćĺ  top: 8px;
   166Ôćĺ}
   167Ôćĺ
   168Ôćĺ/* Reduced motion guard ÔÇö MASTER.md ┬ž5 */
   169Ôćĺ@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
   170Ôćĺ  *, *::before, *::after {
   171Ôćĺ    transition-duration: 0ms !important;
   172Ôćĺ    animation-duration: 0ms !important;
   173Ôćĺ  }
   174Ôćĺ}
   175Ôćĺ
   176Ôćĺ/* ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
   177Ôćĺ   .pen File Token Aliases ÔÇö exact names from HarmonyForge.pen

   181Ôćĺ   ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ */

```text
     1Ôćĺ# HarmonyForge Design System Specification
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺ## 1. Color System
     4Ôćĺ
     5ÔćĺThe color palette utilizes fixed brand inputs structured explicitly into Light Mode (Sonata) and Dark Mode (Nocturne). Semantic meaning is strictly bound to color roles.
     6Ôćĺ
     7Ôćĺ### Light Mode ÔÇö Sonata
     8Ôćĺ
     9Ôćĺ| Role | Color Name | Hex Code | Usage | Theme Token |
    10Ôćĺ| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
    11Ôćĺ| **Background** | Antique White | `#FDF5E6` | Primary app background. | `theme.sonata.bg` |
    12Ôćĺ| **Surface** | Cherry Wood | `#9E4B3E` | Component backgrounds (cards, overlays, panels). | `theme.sonata.surface` |
    13Ôćĺ| **Detail** | Tan Birch | `#D2B48C` | Borders, secondary text, inactive states, staff lines. | `theme.sonata.detail` |
    14Ôćĺ| **Accent** | Amber Glow | `#FFB300` | Focus states, active selection, interactive handles. | `theme.sonata.accent` |
    15Ôćĺ
    16Ôćĺ### Dark Mode ÔÇö Nocturne
    17Ôćĺ
    18Ôćĺ| Role | Color Name | Hex Code | Usage | Theme Token |
    19Ôćĺ| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
    20Ôćĺ| **Background** | Dark Walnut | `#3E2723` | Primary app background. | `theme.nocturne.bg` |
    21Ôćĺ| **Surface** | Cognac | `#A55B37` | Component backgrounds (cards, overlays, panels). | `theme.nocturne.surface` |
    22Ôćĺ| **Detail** | Deep Cocoa | `#2D1817` | Borders, secondary text, inactive states, staff lines. | `theme.nocturne.detail` |
    23Ôćĺ| **Accent** | Amber Glow | `#FFB300` | Focus states, active selection, interactive handles. | `theme.nocturne.accent` |
    24Ôćĺ
    25Ôćĺ### Semantic Color Mappings (Cross-Theme)
    26Ôćĺ
    27Ôćĺ| State | Indicator Color | Token Example | Description |
    28Ôćĺ| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
    29Ôćĺ| **Theory Violation** | `#D32F2F` (Red) | `semantic.violation.base` | Absolute error (e.g., parallel fifths). |
    30Ôćĺ| **Stylistic Warning** | `#1976D2` (Blue) | `semantic.warning.base` | Atypical but valid choices. |
    31Ôćĺ| **User Override** | `#7B1FA2` (Purple) | `semantic.override.base` | Applied to a explicitly bypassed warning. |
    32Ôćĺ| **Valid Deviation** | Theme Detail | `semantic.valid.base` | Adheres to logic without warnings uses standard Detail color. |
    33Ôćĺ
    34Ôćĺ### Color Combinations (WCAG & Semantic Constraints)
    35Ôćĺ
    36Ôćĺ| Background | Foreground Text/Element | Status |
    37Ôćĺ| :--- | :--- | :--- |
    38Ôćĺ| **Theme Surface** | Theme Detail | Ôťů **Valid** (High contrast) |
    39Ôćĺ| **Theme BG** | Theme Detail | Ôťů **Valid** (Border elements) |
    40Ôćĺ| **Theme BG** | Semantic Red | ÔŁî **Forbidden** (Red must sit on a Surface) |
    41Ôćĺ| **Semantic Red** | Theme Detail (Text) | ÔŁî **Forbidden** (Error text uses `#FFFFFF` only) |
    42Ôćĺ| **Warning Blue** | Semantic Red | ÔŁî **Forbidden** (Warnings and errors never touch) |
    43Ôćĺ
    44Ôćĺ---
    45Ôćĺ
    46Ôćĺ## 2. Typography System
    47Ôćĺ
    48Ôćĺ**Typefaces**
    49Ôćĺ
    50Ôćĺ* **Header (Brand):** Instrument Serif
    51Ôćĺ* **Body (Content):** Inter
    52Ôćĺ* **Labels (UI):** Inter
    53Ôćĺ* **System (Data):** Satoshi / SF Pro
    54Ôćĺ
    55Ôćĺ**Type Scale & Usage (Accessible Modular Scale)**
    56Ôćĺ
    57Ôćĺ| Level | Font Family | Size (px/rem) | Weight/Style | Line Height | Usage |
    58Ôćĺ| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
    59Ôćĺ| **Heading 1 (Hero)** | Instrument Serif | 39px (2.441rem) | 600 Semi-Bold | 1.1 | Major project headers, album titles. |
    60Ôćĺ| **Heading 2 (Section)**| Instrument Serif | 33px (2.074rem) | 600 Semi-Bold | 1.2 | Artist names, core section titles. |
    61Ôćĺ| **Heading 3 (Card)** | Instrument Serif | 23px (1.440rem) | 600 Semi-Bold | 1.2 | Component/Card titles. |
    62Ôćĺ| **Body (Large)** | Inter | 19px (1.200rem) | 400 Regular | 1.5 | Featured biographies, lead paragraphs. |
    63Ôćĺ| **Body (Base)** | Inter | 16px (1.000rem) | 400 Regular | 1.5 | Standard long-form settings, descriptions. |
    64Ôćĺ| **Labels (UI)** | Inter | 13px (0.833rem) | 500 Medium (Caps) | 1.0 (Fixed) | Sidebar navigation, buttons, tooltips. |
    65Ôćĺ| **System (Data)** | Satoshi / SF Pro | 13px (0.833rem) | 400 Regular (Mono) | 1.4 | Technical metadata (BPM, timestamps). |
    66Ôćĺ| **System (Micro)** | Satoshi / SF Pro | 11px (0.694rem) | 400 Regular (Mono) | 1.4 | File sizes, timestamp suffixes. |
    67Ôćĺ
    68Ôćĺ---
    69Ôćĺ
    70Ôćĺ## 3. Spacing, Radius & Geometry
    71Ôćĺ
    72Ôćĺ**Spacing System (8-Point Grid)**
    73Ôćĺ
    74Ôćĺ* `2px` (Minor) ÔÇö Gap between grouped monospace data items.
    75Ôćĺ* `4px` (Tight) ÔÇö Padding inside small interactive toggles or input boundaries.
    76Ôćĺ* `8px` (Base) ÔÇö Margins parsing list items within the Theory Inspector.
    77Ôćĺ* `16px` (Default) ÔÇö Standard padding for Surface Cards and Modal dialogues.
    78Ôćĺ* `32px` (Macro) ÔÇö Spatial separation between Sandbox and Sidebar.
    79Ôćĺ
    80Ôćĺ**Border Radius System**
    81Ôćĺ
    82Ôćĺ* `0px` (Sharp) ÔÇö Edges connected to the VexFlow canvas, red logic lines, and algorithmic constraints.
    83Ôćĺ* `2px` (Micro) ÔÇö Tooltips and metadata pills.
    84Ôćĺ* `4px` (Standard) ÔÇö Interactive buttons, overrides, and toggles (signifying human touch).
    85Ôćĺ* `50%` (Circular) ÔÇö Singularly reserved for the draggable noteheads.
    86Ôćĺ
    87Ôćĺ---
    88Ôćĺ
    89Ôćĺ## 4. Layout & Responsiveness
    90Ôćĺ
    91ÔćĺTo ensure the Glass-box UI degrades gracefully while preserving the VexFlow canvas:
    92Ôćĺ
    93Ôćĺ* **Breakpoint Constraints:**
    94Ôćĺ  * `lg` (Ôëą1024px): 70% Sandbox / 30% Theory Inspector (Side-by-Side).
    95Ôćĺ  * `md` (768px - 1023px): 60% Sandbox / 40% Theory Inspector.
    96Ôćĺ  * `sm` (<768px): Stacked. The `InteractiveTactileSandbox` takes 100% width. The `TheoryInspectorSidebar` becomes a bottom-anchored pull-up drawer (BottomSheet) triggered by selection.
    97Ôćĺ* **VexFlow Scaling:** The VexFlow SVG target `div` must NOT use fixed pixel widths. It must use `w-full h-full` and rely on a `ResizeObserver` hook to trigger a re-render of `Vex.Flow.Factory` when container dimensions change.
    98Ôćĺ* **Typography Scaling:** Use CSS `clamp()` for headings to prevent horizontal overflow in Inspector panels.
    99Ôćĺ
   100Ôćĺ---
   101Ôćĺ
   102Ôćĺ## 5. Motion & Interaction Rules
   103Ôćĺ
   104Ôćĺ* **Note Drag Behavior:** Notes move discretely via a snapping coordinate system corresponding to semitones/diatonic steps. Continuous, fluid dragging (analog-style physical interpolation) is forbidden to enforce strict symbolic logic.
   105Ôćĺ* **Violation Reveal Timing:** Zero latency. Red Line systems appear simultaneously with the drop event/keyboard confirmation. No "fade-in" animations are permitted.
   106Ôćĺ* **Repair Transitions:** When switching between user state and recommended repair state, employ a crisp `0ms` swap. Linear interpolation (`100ms max`) reserved strictly for programmatic voice-leading paths in SVG nodes only.
   107Ôćĺ* **Forbidden Animation:** No bouncing, spring physics, or easing functions that imply weight or physical realism.
   108Ôćĺ
   109Ôćĺ---
   110Ôćĺ
   111Ôćĺ## 6. Iconography System
   112Ôćĺ
   113Ôćĺ* **Style:** Sharp, linear, 1.5px stroke weight (2px on hover). Filled icons are explicitly forbidden unless representing active global state booleans.
   114Ôćĺ* **Visual Metaphors:** Avoid consumer UI metaphors (no "magic wands" for generation). Use drafting and mechanical metaphors (e.g., compasses, set squares, logic gates).
   115Ôćĺ* **Semantic Geometry:**
   116Ôćĺ  * **Sharp Angles (Triangles/Rectangles):** Denote algorithmic rules, calculations, and constraints.
   117Ôćĺ  * **Curves/Circles:** Denote user input, human interaction, or override functions.
   118Ôćĺ
   119Ôćĺ---
   120Ôćĺ
   121Ôćĺ## 7. Accessibility, Operability, Content & Voice (POUR)
   122Ôćĺ
   123Ôćĺ**1. Perceivable & Operable**
   124Ôćĺ
   125Ôćĺ* **Color Independence:** Semantic color cues must always be paired with secondary visual signifiers (e.g., solid line vs. dashed line).
   126Ôćĺ* **Edit-Authority via Keyboard:** Full edit-authority of the VexFlow state must be possible via Arrow and Modifier keys without a pointer device. Tab sequences must fluidly navigate between the Sandbox and Inspector layers.
   127Ôćĺ
   128Ôćĺ**2. Understandable & Robust**
   129Ôćĺ
   130Ôćĺ* **Screen Reader Handling:** Draggable Note Tokens inject ARIA labels formatted as `[Voice]: [Pitch] [Duration]` (e.g., `Soprano: C5 Quarter Note`).
   131Ôćĺ* **Live Regions for Causality:** Rule violations announce immediately as aria-live critical alerts: `Alert: Parallel Fifth detected between Soprano and Tenor`.
   132Ôćĺ* **Semantic DOM Elements:** SVG interaction must map to standard, accessible HTML `<button>` and `<input>` proxy elements within the React application tree.
   133Ôćĺ
   134Ôćĺ**3. Content & Voice Guidelines**
   135Ôćĺ
   136Ôćĺ* **Tone:** Scholarly, objective, calm, and non-judgmental. Do not use conversational filler or emotional validation.
   137Ôćĺ* **AI Explanations:** Confined strictly to the Theory Inspector panel to prevent cluttering the Sandbox. Use precise language like "Stylistic Observation: Doubled Leading Tone."
   138Ôćĺ
   139Ôćĺ---
   140Ôćĺ
   141Ôćĺ## 8. Developer Hand-off & Schema Definition
   142Ôćĺ
   143ÔćĺTo effectively generate production-ready React/VexFlow code without hallucination, all components and logic must adhere to the following contracts.
   144Ôćĺ
   145Ôćĺ### A. State Management & Data Ontology (Zustand)
   146Ôćĺ
   147ÔćĺThe core of the application must rely on a strictly typed, immutable representation of musical state.
   148Ôćĺ
   149Ôćĺ```typescript
   150Ôćĺ// types/music.ts
   151Ôćĺ
   152Ôćĺ/**
   153Ôćĺ * Employs the "Theory Named" strategy. 
   154Ôćĺ * Pitches must be explicitly defined using scientific pitch notation.
   155Ôćĺ */
   156Ôćĺexport type PitchClass = 'C' | 'C#' | 'D' | 'D#' | 'E' | 'F' | 'F#' | 'G' | 'G#' | 'A' | 'A#' | 'B';
   157Ôćĺexport type Octave = 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 | 7;
   158Ôćĺexport type Duration = 'w' | 'h' | 'q' | '8' | '16'; // VexFlow compatible
   159Ôćĺ
   160Ôćĺexport interface NoteEvent {
   161Ôćĺ  id: string; // Unique UUID
   162Ôćĺ  pitch: `${PitchClass}${Octave}`; 
   163Ôćĺ  duration: Duration;
   164Ôćĺ  voice: 'Soprano' | 'Alto' | 'Tenor' | 'Bass';
   165Ôćĺ  isUserModified: boolean; // Triggers UI 'Accent' color states
   166Ôćĺ}
   167Ôćĺ
   168Ôćĺexport interface TheoryViolation {
   169Ôćĺ  id: string;
   170Ôćĺ  ruleId: string; // e.g., 'RULE_PARALLEL_FIFTH'
   171Ôćĺ  severity: 'Violation' | 'Warning';
   172Ôćĺ  involvedNoteIds: string[]; // Maps directly to Red Line SVGs
   173Ôćĺ  isOverridden: boolean;
   174Ôćĺ}
   175Ôćĺ
   176Ôćĺ// store/useScoreStore.ts
   177Ôćĺexport interface ScoreState {
   178Ôćĺ  notes: NoteEvent[];
   179Ôćĺ  violations: TheoryViolation[];
   180Ôćĺ  selectedNoteId: string | null;
   181Ôćĺ  moveNote: (id: string, newPitch: `${PitchClass}${Octave}`) => void;
   182Ôćĺ  toggleOverride: (violationId: string) => void;
   183Ôćĺ}
   184Ôćĺ```
   185Ôćĺ
   186Ôćĺ### B. VexFlow / React Boundary Constraints
   187Ôćĺ
   188ÔćĺDirect manipulation of the VexFlow canvas via virtual DOM updates is forbidden.
   189Ôćĺ
   190Ôćĺ* **The Rule of the Wrapper:** VexFlow rendering logic must be isolated within a `useEffect` hook that triggers re-renders *only* when the symbolic `ScoreState` changes or container resizes.
   191Ôćĺ* **Proxy Elements for POUR:** Invisible HTML `<button>` elements must be positioned absolutely over the VexFlow note coordinates to handle `onFocus`, `onKeyDown`, and `onClick` synthetic events, dispatching updates to Zustand.
   192Ôćĺ
   193Ôćĺ```typescript
   194Ôćĺ// components/organisms/StaffRenderer.tsx
   195Ôćĺ// Required implementation pattern
   196Ôćĺ
   197Ôćĺexport const StaffRenderer: React.FC = () => {
   198Ôćĺ  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
   199Ôćĺ  const notes = useScoreStore((state) => state.notes);
   200Ôćĺ
   201Ôćĺ  useEffect(() => {
   202Ôćĺ    if (!containerRef.current) return;
   203Ôćĺ    
   204Ôćĺ    // 1. Clear previous canvas
   205Ôćĺ    containerRef.current.innerHTML = '';
   206Ôćĺ    
   207Ôćĺ    // 2. Initialize VexFlow Formatter
   208Ôćĺ    const vf = new Vex.Flow.Factory({
   209Ôćĺ      renderer: { elementId: containerRef.current, width: containerRef.current.clientWidth, height: 200 }
   210Ôćĺ    });
   211Ôćĺ    
   212Ôćĺ    // 3. Map strictly typed NoteEvents to Vex.Flow.StaveNote
   213Ôćĺ    // ... Imperative VexFlow logic here ...
   214Ôćĺ    
   215Ôćĺ    vf.draw();
   216Ôćĺ  }, [notes]); // Re-render strictly bounded to state determinism AND resize events
   217Ôćĺ
   218Ôćĺ  return <div ref={containerRef} className="relative w-full h-full" />;
   219Ôćĺ};
   220Ôćĺ```
   221Ôćĺ
   222Ôćĺ### C. React Component Library (Atomic Specification)
   223Ôćĺ
   224ÔćĺLLMs must implement the following Prop interfaces exactly as defined. Do not generate arbitrary local state; all core logic resides in Zustand.
   225Ôćĺ
   226Ôćĺ**Atoms**
   227Ôćĺ
   228Ôćĺ```typescript
   229Ôćĺinterface SemanticLabelProps {
   230Ôćĺ  type: 'Violation' | 'Warning' | 'Override' | 'Valid';
   231Ôćĺ  text: string;
   232Ôćĺ  className?: string;
   233Ôćĺ}
   234Ôćĺ
   235Ôćĺinterface ToggleSwitchBaseProps {
   236Ôćĺ  checked: boolean;
   237Ôćĺ  onChange: (checked: boolean) => void;
   238Ôćĺ  ariaLabel: string;
   239Ôćĺ  disabled?: boolean;
   240Ôćĺ}
   241Ôćĺ```
   242Ôćĺ
   243Ôćĺ**Molecules**
   244Ôćĺ
   245Ôćĺ```typescript
   246Ôćĺinterface DraggableNoteTokenProps {
   247Ôćĺ  id: string; // References NoteEvent UUID
   248Ôćĺ  pitch: string;
   249Ôćĺ  isFocused: boolean;
   250Ôćĺ  hasError: boolean;
   251Ôćĺ  onMove: (newPitch: string) => void;
   252Ôćĺ}
   253Ôćĺ
   254Ôćĺinterface TheoryViolationIndicatorProps {
   255Ôćĺ  id: string;
   256Ôćĺ  severity: 'Violation' | 'Warning';
   257Ôćĺ  points: { x: number; y: number }[]; // Computed BBox from VexFlow
   258Ôćĺ  isOverridden: boolean;
   259Ôćĺ}
   260Ôćĺ
   261Ôćĺinterface ConstraintControlProps {
   262Ôćĺ  currentLevel: 'Strict' | 'Standard' | 'Loose';
   263Ôćĺ  onLevelChange: (level: 'Strict' | 'Standard' | 'Loose') => void;
   264Ôćĺ}
   265Ôćĺ```
   266Ôćĺ
   267Ôćĺ**Organisms**
   268Ôćĺ
   269Ôćĺ```typescript
   270Ôćĺinterface TheoryExplanationCardProps {
   271Ôćĺ  violationId: string;
   272Ôćĺ  ruleId: string;
   273Ôćĺ  severity: 'Violation' | 'Warning';
   274Ôćĺ  academicDescription: string; // Scholarly tone enforced
   275Ôćĺ  isOverridden: boolean;
   276Ôćĺ  onOverrideToggle: (violationId: string) => void;
   277Ôćĺ}
   278Ôćĺ```
   279Ôćĺ
   280Ôćĺ---
   281Ôćĺ
   282Ôćĺ## 9. Music Theory Rendering Axioms
   283Ôćĺ
   284ÔćĺTo utilize the **"Theory Named" strategy** effectively, the UI visually translates axiomatic music logic under these constraints:
   285Ôćĺ
   286Ôćĺ1. **Pitch vs. Spelling Strictness:** The system must differentiate between enharmonic equivalents (e.g., C# vs. Db). Interpreting intervals based on MIDI note numbers is forbidden. VexFlow must receive the exact theoretical spelling from the Backend.
   287Ôćĺ2. **Violation Coordinates (The "Red Line" Tooltips):** When drawing the `TheoryViolationIndicator` molecule over VexFlow output, the bounding box of the specific `StaveNote` instances involved must be calculated. The Red Line is an SVG overlay using React portal logic relative to the `containerRef`, ensuring decoupling from VexFlow computation.
   288Ôćĺ3. **Non-Blocking Edits:** The handler for a `moveNote` action must inherently accept *any* pitch modification. The UI renders the new pitch instantly, and evaluating constraints follows afterwards. The UI must never reject a move action defensively (Expressive Sovereignty).
   289Ôćĺ
   290Ôćĺ---
   291Ôćĺ
   292Ôćĺ## 10. Design Tokens (JSON Base)
   293Ôćĺ
   294ÔćĺThe system leverages hierarchical token mapping via JSON, easily compiled to Tailwind CSS theme schemas.
   295Ôćĺ
   296Ôćĺ```json
   297Ôćĺ{
   298Ôćĺ  "harmonyForge": {
   299Ôćĺ    "color": {
   300Ôćĺ      "sonata": {

   302Ôćĺ        "surface": "#9E4B3E",

   305Ôćĺ      },
   306Ôćĺ      "nocturne": {

   309Ôćĺ        "detail": "#2D1817",

   311Ôćĺ      },
   312Ôćĺ      "semantic": {

   314Ôćĺ        "warning": "#1976D2",
   315Ôćĺ        "override": "#7B1FA2",

     9Ôćĺ * Maps to font-brand (Fraunces) and text-on-light scale.

    12Ôćĺ  ({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
    13Ôćĺ    return (
    14Ôćĺ      <h1
    15Ôćĺ        ref={ref}

    22Ôćĺ          className,

```text
     1Ôćĺ/**
     2Ôćĺ * noteFactory.ts
     3Ôćĺ * Symbolic note generation for HarmonyForge Tactile Sandbox.
     4Ôćĺ * Output: VexFlow-compatible StaveNote descriptors (no audio synthesis).
     5Ôćĺ */
     6Ôćĺ
     7Ôćĺexport type Duration = "w" | "h" | "q" | "8" | "16";
     8Ôćĺ
     9Ôćĺexport interface SymbolicNote {
    10Ôćĺ  /** VexFlow key format, e.g. "c/4" */
    11Ôćĺ  key: string;
    12Ôćĺ  duration: Duration;
    13Ôćĺ  /** Optional: MIDI pitch for Tone.js playback */
    14Ôćĺ  midi: number;
    15Ôćĺ}
    16Ôćĺ
    17Ôćĺexport interface Measure {
    18Ôćĺ  notes: SymbolicNote[];
    19Ôćĺ  /** e.g. "4/4" */
    20Ôćĺ  timeSignature: string;
    21Ôćĺ}
    22Ôćĺ
    23Ôćĺ// ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ C Major scale, octave 4 ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    24Ôćĺconst C_MAJOR_SCALE: Array<{ key: string; midi: number }> = [
    25Ôćĺ  { key: "c/4", midi: 60 },
    26Ôćĺ  { key: "d/4", midi: 62 },
    27Ôćĺ  { key: "e/4", midi: 64 },
    28Ôćĺ  { key: "f/4", midi: 65 },
    29Ôćĺ  { key: "g/4", midi: 67 },
    30Ôćĺ  { key: "a/4", midi: 69 },
    31Ôćĺ  { key: "b/4", midi: 71 },
    32Ôćĺ  { key: "c/5", midi: 72 },
    33Ôćĺ];
    34Ôćĺ
    35Ôćĺ/**
    36Ôćĺ * Generates `measureCount` measures of random quarter notes drawn from
    37Ôćĺ * the provided scale. Deterministic when `seed` is supplied (LCG RNG).
    38Ôćĺ */
    39Ôćĺexport function generateMeasures(
    40Ôćĺ  measureCount = 2,
    41Ôćĺ  beatsPerMeasure = 4,
    42Ôćĺ  scale = C_MAJOR_SCALE,
    43Ôćĺ  seed?: number
    44Ôćĺ): Measure[] {
    45Ôćĺ  let state = seed ?? Date.now();
    46Ôćĺ  const lcg = (): number => {
    47Ôćĺ    state = (state * 1664525 + 1013904223) & 0xffffffff;
    48Ôćĺ    return (state >>> 0) / 0xffffffff;
    49Ôćĺ  };
    50Ôćĺ
    51Ôćĺ  return Array.from({ length: measureCount }, () => ({
    52Ôćĺ    timeSignature: `${beatsPerMeasure}/4`,
    53Ôćĺ    notes: Array.from({ length: beatsPerMeasure }, () => {
    54Ôćĺ      const entry = scale[Math.floor(lcg() * scale.length)];
    55Ôćĺ      return { key: entry.key, duration: "q" as Duration, midi: entry.midi };
    56Ôćĺ    }),
    57Ôćĺ  }));
    58Ôćĺ}
    59Ôćĺ
    60Ôćĺ/**
    61Ôćĺ * Converts SymbolicNote[] Ôćĺ plain VexFlow StaveNote constructor args.
    62Ôćĺ * Import `StaveNote` from "vexflow" to hydrate these.
    63Ôćĺ */
    64Ôćĺexport function toVexFlowArgs(
    65Ôćĺ  note: SymbolicNote
    66Ôćĺ): { keys: string[]; duration: string } {
    67Ôćĺ  return { keys: [note.key], duration: note.duration };
    68Ôćĺ}
    69Ôćĺ
```
</details></tool-use>

### 2. **Package Dependencies**

**Production:**
- `next@16.1.6` ÔÇö App Router, TypeScript support
- `react@19.2.3` / `react-dom@19.2.3` ÔÇö Core UI
- `tailwindcss@4` (via `@tailwindcss/postcss`) ÔÇö CSS-first utility framework
- **`vexflow@5.0.0`** ÔÇö Score rendering (symbolic only)
- **`tone@15.1.22`** ÔÇö Playback scheduling (no raw audio synthesis)
- **`zustand@5.0.11`** ÔÇö Lightweight state management
- `next-themes@0.4.6` ÔÇö Theme switching (light/dark)
- `framer-motion@12.34.3` ÔÇö Animation library
- `lucide-react@0.575.0` ÔÇö Icon library (sharp, linear)
- `@phosphor-icons/react@2.1.10` ÔÇö Alternative icon set
- `clsx@2.1.1` + `tailwind-merge@3.5.0` ÔÇö Utility class merging

**DevDependencies:**
- `typescript@5` ÔÇö Strict mode required
- `eslint@9` + `eslint-config-next`

### 3. **Design Tokens (src/app/globals.css)**

#### **@theme Block (Tailwind v4 CSS-first)**

| Token | CSS Variable | Purpose |
|-------|---|---|
| `--color-hf-bg` | `var(--hf-bg)` | Primary app background (theme-aware) |
| `--color-hf-surface` | `var(--hf-surface)` | Component surfaces (cards, panels) |
| `--color-hf-detail` | `var(--hf-detail)` | Borders, secondary text, staff lines |
| `--color-hf-accent` | `var(--hf-accent)` | Focus states, active selection (#FFB300) |
| `--color-hf-text` | `var(--hf-text-primary)` | Primary text |
| `--color-hf-text-sub` | `var(--hf-text-secondary)` | Secondary text |
| `--color-hf-violation` | `#d32f2f` | Semantic: Theory violations (Red) |
| `--color-hf-warning` | `#1976d2` | Semantic: Stylistic warnings (Blue) |
| `--color-hf-override` | `#7b1fa2` | Semantic: User overrides (Purple) |

#### **Typography Tokens**

| Token | Font | Purpose |
|-------|------|---------|
| `--font-brand` | Instrument Serif | Hero titles, brand text |
| `--font-body` | Inter | Body text, labels |
| `--font-system` | Satoshi / SF Pro | System data, metadata |

#### **Spacing (8-pt grid)**

```css
--spacing-minor:  2px;    /* Gaps between monospace data */
--spacing-tight:  4px;    /* Small interactive toggles */
--spacing-base:   8px;    /* List item margins */
--spacing-global: 16px;   /* Standard padding (cards, modals) */
--spacing-macro:  32px;   /* Spatial separation (Sandbox/Sidebar) */
```

#### **Border Radius**

```css
--radius-sharp:    0px;   /* VexFlow canvas, logic lines */
--radius-micro:    2px;   /* Tooltips, metadata pills */
--radius-standard: 4px;   /* Buttons, toggles (human touch) */
/* Circular (50%) reserved for draggable noteheads */
```

#### **Shadows (Volumetric Scale)**

```css
--shadow-sm:    0 1px 2px 0 rgba(detail-rgb, 0.08);
--shadow-md:    0 4px 6px -1px rgba(detail-rgb, 0.12), 0 2px 4px -1px rgba(detail-rgb, 0.07);
--shadow-lg:    0 10px 15px -3px rgba(detail-rgb, 0.12), 0 4px 6px -2px rgba(detail-rgb, 0.06);
--shadow-xl:    0 20px 25px -5px rgba(detail-rgb, 0.12), 0 10px 10px -5px rgba(detail-rgb, 0.05);
--shadow-inner: inset 0 2px 4px 0 rgba(detail-rgb, 0.08);
```

#### **Z-Index Scale**

```css
--z-tooltip:  10;
--z-modal:    20;
--z-drawer:   30;
--z-critical: 50;
```

#### **Nocturne (Dark Mode) ÔÇö .dark**

| Role | Name | Hex | CSS Variable |
|------|------|-----|---|

| **Surface** | Cognac | `#A55B37` | `--nocturne-surface` |

| **Text Primary** | ÔÇö | `#F8F8F8` | `--text-on-dark` |
| **Text Secondary** | ÔÇö | `#A55B37B3` (surface @ 70%) | (in `--hf-text-secondary`) |

**Additional Nocturne opacity variants:**
- `--nocturne-surface-10`, `-20`, `-40`, `-70`, `-90`
- `--nocturne-accent-10`, `-70`, `-90`

#### **Semantic Colors (Cross-Theme, Fixed)**

| State | Color | Hex | CSS Variable |
|-------|-------|-----|---|
| **Violation** | Red | `#D32F2F` | `--semantic-violation` |
| **Warning** | Blue | `#1976D2` | `--semantic-warning` |
| **Override** | Purple | `#7B1FA2` | `--semantic-override` |
| **Valid** | Detail Color | Theme-dependent | `--semantic-valid` |

#### **Neutrals (Cross-Theme)**

```css
--neutral-50:  #F5F0EF;   /* Lightest */
--neutral-100: #E8DCDA;
--neutral-200: #C8B8B6;
--neutral-500: #7A6B69;
--neutral-700: #4A3B39;
--neutral-900: #1A1110;   /* Darkest */
```

#### **Special Purpose**

| Variable | Value | Purpose |
|----------|-------|---------|
| `--hf-canvas-bg` | `#faf0dc` (Light) / `#1a1110` (Dark) | VexFlow canvas background |
| `--hf-toolbar-bg` | `rgba(..., 0.92)` | Bottom toolbar surface |
| `--hf-toolbar-border` | `rgba(..., 0.4)` | Toolbar border color |
| `--hf-panel-bg` | `#F5F0EF` (Light) / `#2D1817` (Dark) | Right panel alt background |
| `--hf-staff-line` | `var(--sonata-detail)` or surface-40 | Score staff line color |

### 6. **Component Patterns & Code Style**

#### **Typing Pattern (All Components)**

```typescript
// Props interface extends React HTML element props
export interface ComponentProps extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement> {
  // Custom props
  customProp?: string;
}

// forwardRef for DOM access
export const Component = React.forwardRef<HTMLElement, ComponentProps>(
  ({ customProp, className, ...props }, ref) => {
    return (
      <div ref={ref} className={cn("base-styles", className)} {...props}>
        Content
      </div>
    );
  }
);

Component.displayName = "Component";
```

#### **Design Token Usage**

```typescript
// Direct CSS variables via style prop
style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}
style={{ backgroundColor: "var(--hf-surface)" }}

// Color mixing (CSS Color Module Level 4)
style={{ backgroundColor: "color-mix(in srgb, var(--hf-surface) 10%, transparent)" }}

// Tailwind utilities with token colors
className="border-[var(--hf-detail)]"
className="text-[var(--hf-text-primary)]"
```

#### **Accessibility (POUR)**

- `aria-label` on interactive elements
- `aria-hidden="true"` on decorative SVG
- Focus rings via globals.css: `outline: 2px solid var(--hf-accent)`
- Role attributes: `role="list"`, `role="listitem"`, `role="img"`
- Skip link in layout.tsx

#### **Theme Switching**

```typescript
// Uses next-themes
const { theme, setTheme } = useTheme();

// Output: dark attribute on <html> activates .dark CSS
// CSS vars respond dynamically via CSS :root and .dark selectors
```

---

### 7. **Music & Score Logic**

#### **Symbolic Note System (noteFactory.ts)**

```typescript
// Types
type Duration = "w" | "h" | "q" | "8" | "16";  // VexFlow compatible

interface SymbolicNote {
  key: string;              // e.g. "c/4" (VexFlow format)
  duration: Duration;       // Quarter note = "q"
  midi: number;             // For Tone.js scheduling
}

interface Measure {
  notes: SymbolicNote[];
  timeSignature: string;    // e.g. "4/4"
}

// Factory functions
- generateMeasures(count, beatsPerMeasure, scale, seed?)
  Ôćĺ Measure[]
- toVexFlowArgs(note: SymbolicNote)
  Ôćĺ { keys: string[], duration: string }
```

**Key Constraint:** Symbolic only ÔÇö MIDI values are for Tone.js scheduling, not audio synthesis. No AudioContext manipulation in frontend.

export interface ScoreState {
  notes: NoteEvent[];
  violations: TheoryViolation[];
  selectedNoteId: string | null;
  moveNote: (id: string, newPitch: string) => void;
  toggleOverride: (violationId: string) => void;
}

### 9. **Design System File References**

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| **design-system.md** | Full spec: colors, typography, spacing, motion rules, POUR guidelines, Music Theory axioms, JSON token schema |
| **src/app/globals.css** | Tailwind v4 CSS-first implementation of design-system.md tokens |
| **PLAN.md** | 4-phase redesign roadmap |
| **HarmonyForge.pen** | Design file (Pencil app) ÔÇö source of truth for component visuals & Pencil Node IDs |

---

### 10. **Key Architectural Boundaries**

| Concern | Location | What's Forbidden |
|---------|----------|------------------|
| **Score rendering** | Frontend (VexFlow) | No direct DOM manipulation outside useEffect |
| **Playback** | Frontend (Tone.js) | No raw AudioContext access; symbolic scheduling only |
| **Constraint logic** | Backend only | Never implement voice-leading rules in frontend |
| **Theory violations** | Backend API Ôćĺ displayed in frontend | Red Line tooltips rendered via React, data sourced from API |
| **State** | Zustand | No local useState for core musical data |

---

### 11. **Utility Functions**

**`src/lib/utils.ts`:**

```typescript
// Custom Tailwind merge with shadow/radius extensions
function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {
  return customTwMerge(clsx(inputs));
}

// Supports: shadow-sm/md/lg/xl/inner, rounded-sharp/micro/standard
```

| **Type System** | Strict TypeScript, React.forwardRef patterns |
| **Music Theory** | "Theory Named" strategy enforced (per design-system.md) |

# Export Modal ÔÇö Component Breakdown Plan

## Context
Superman wants the Export Modal (Node LxifV) decomposed into individual reusable components before assembly. Components must support both Sonata (light) and Nocturne (dark) themes via CSS variable tokens. Claude-flow swarm will parallelize atom/molecule creation.

**Note:** Pencil MCP requires the .pen file to be open in the Pencil app UI ÔÇö batch_get was unavailable. Plan is based on the node structure Superman provided and the design token map from `globals.css`.

---

## Node Ôćĺ Component Map

| Node ID | Node Label | Component | Layer |
|---------|------------|-----------|-------|
| `LxifV` | Export Modal (full) | `ExportModal` | organism |
| `5uv8B` | modal | `ModalContainer` + `ModalOverlay` | molecule + atom |
| `PxUka` | Score preview + metadata | `ScorePreviewCard` | molecule |
| `U7Ypk` | "Export as" header | `ExportSectionHeader` | atom |
| `kwqUb` | option 1 | `ExportOptionCard` | atom |
| `JBmgN` | option 2 | `ExportOptionCard` | atom (same component, different props) |
| `agY9R` | export button | Extends existing `Button` or new `ExportButton` | atom |

---

## Component Breakdown

### Atoms (3 new files)

#### 1. `src/components/atoms/ModalOverlay.tsx`
- Full-screen semi-transparent backdrop
- Props: `onClose: () => void`, `isVisible: boolean`
- Token: `background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--hf-bg) 60%, transparent)`
- Backdrop blur: `backdrop-filter: blur(4px)`
- POUR: `aria-hidden="true"`, click handler closes modal
- Animation: Framer Motion `opacity` fade (0 Ôćĺ 1)

#### 2. `src/components/atoms/ExportOptionCard.tsx`
- Selectable format card (one per export type)
- Props: `format: ExportFormat`, `label: string`, `description: string`, `icon: ReactNode`, `isSelected: boolean`, `onSelect: (format: ExportFormat) => void`
- Token states:
  - Default: `border: 1px solid var(--hf-detail)`, `bg: var(--hf-surface)`
  - Selected: `border: 2px solid var(--hf-accent)`, `bg: color-mix(in srgb, var(--hf-accent) 10%, var(--hf-surface))`
- `radius-standard` (4px), `shadow-sm`
- POUR: `role="radio"`, `aria-checked={isSelected}`, keyboard `Enter`/`Space` to select

#### 3. `src/components/atoms/ExportSectionHeader.tsx`
- "Export as" label with optional subtitle
- Props: `label: string`, `subtitle?: string`
- Token: `font-brand` (Instrument Serif), `color: var(--hf-text-primary)`
- Semantic: `<h3>` element

### Molecules (2 new files)

#### 4. `src/components/molecules/ScorePreviewCard.tsx`
- Left/top section of modal: miniature score thumbnail + metadata
- Props: `scoreMetadata: ScoreMetadata` (see Types below)
- Sub-elements:
  - Thumbnail area: `var(--hf-canvas-bg)` background, `radius-micro` (2px), `shadow-inner`
  - Metadata list: title (font-brand), composer/key/time-sig (font-system, text-sub)
- No VexFlow rendering inside modal ÔÇö static placeholder or SVG stub

#### 5. `src/components/molecules/ExportOptionsPanel.tsx`
- "Export as" header + option cards group
- Props: `options: ExportOption[]`, `selectedFormat: ExportFormat`, `onSelect: (format: ExportFormat) => void`
- Renders: `ExportSectionHeader` + `ExportOptionCard[]` in a `role="radiogroup"` container
- Layout: vertical stack, `spacing-base` (8px) gap between cards

### Organism (1 new file)

#### 6. `src/components/organisms/ExportModal.tsx`
- Full assembly matching Node LxifV
- Composes: `ModalOverlay` + `ModalContainer` (div) + `ScorePreviewCard` + `ExportOptionsPanel` + `ExportButton`
- Props: `ExportModalProps` (see Types)
- Portal: renders via `ReactDOM.createPortal` into `document.body`
- `z-index: var(--z-modal)` (20)
- POUR: `role="dialog"`, `aria-modal="true"`, `aria-labelledby` pointing to modal title, focus trap on open, `Escape` closes

### Shared Types

**New file: `src/types/export.ts`**
\```typescript
export type ExportFormat = 'musicxml' | 'pdf';

export interface ScoreMetadata {
  title: string;
  composer?: string;
  timeSignature: string;     // e.g. "4/4"
  keySignature: string;      // e.g. "C major"
  measureCount: number;
}

export interface ExportOption {
  format: ExportFormat;
  label: string;             // e.g. "MusicXML"
  description: string;       // e.g. "Editable score format"
  icon: React.ReactNode;
}

export interface ExportModalProps {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  scoreMetadata: ScoreMetadata;
  onExport: (format: ExportFormat) => Promise<void>;
}
\```

---

## Theme Support (Both Modes)

All components use only CSS variable tokens ÔÇö no hard-coded hex values.

| Role | Light (Sonata) | Dark (Nocturne) | Token |
|------|---------------|-----------------|-------|
| Modal bg | `#FDF5E6` | `#3E2723` | `var(--hf-bg)` |
| Surface | `--sonata-surface` | `--nocturne-surface` | `var(--hf-surface)` |
| Border | `--sonata-detail` | `--nocturne-detail` | `var(--hf-detail)` |
| Accent (selected) | `#FFB300` | `#FFB300` | `var(--hf-accent)` |
| Text primary | `#1A1A1A` | `#F8F8F8` | `var(--hf-text-primary)` |
| Text secondary | `#6B5740` | `var(--nocturne-surface)@70%` | `var(--hf-text-secondary)` |
| Canvas bg | `#faf0dc` | `#1a1110` | `var(--hf-canvas-bg)` |

---

## Claude-flow Execution Strategy

\```bash
# 1. Init swarm (hierarchical, 6 agents)
npx @claude-flow/cli@latest swarm init --topology hierarchical --max-agents 6 --strategy specialized

# 2. Parallel atom creation (3 agents simultaneously)
# Agent 1 Ôćĺ ModalOverlay + types/export.ts
# Agent 2 Ôćĺ ExportOptionCard
# Agent 3 Ôćĺ ExportSectionHeader

# 3. Parallel molecule creation (2 agents) after atoms complete
# Agent 4 Ôćĺ ScorePreviewCard
# Agent 5 Ôćĺ ExportOptionsPanel

# 4. Organism assembly (1 agent) after molecules complete
# Agent 6 Ôćĺ ExportModal (reads LxifV for final assembly reference)
\```

Agents spawn in ONE message with `run_in_background: true`. No polling ÔÇö wait for results.

---

## Execution Order

1. **`src/types/export.ts`** ÔÇö shared types (blocks all components)
2. **Atoms in parallel:** `ModalOverlay.tsx`, `ExportOptionCard.tsx`, `ExportSectionHeader.tsx`
3. **Molecules in parallel:** `ScorePreviewCard.tsx`, `ExportOptionsPanel.tsx`
4. **Organism:** `ExportModal.tsx` (references Node LxifV for final visual check)
